pack_intro: How you learn and what you're working on.

questions.question: When learning something new, you prefer:
questions.why_this_matters: Shapes how AI teaches you — video vs reading vs practice.

options.label: Video tutorials — I need to see it done
options.export_rule: I learn best from video. Link tutorials when available. Describe visually.

options.label: Articles and documentation — I read fast
options.export_rule: I learn through reading. Give me detailed written explanations and docs links.

options.label: Hands-on practice — give me exercises
options.export_rule: I learn by practicing. Give me exercises and challenges, not just explanations.

options.label: Build a project — I learn by shipping real things
options.export_rule: I learn by building. Frame learning as 'build X to learn Y', not abstract exercises.

questions.question: What are you currently learning or want to learn?
questions.why_this_matters: Lets AI tailor examples and references to your learning areas.
questions.placeholder: e.g. Rust, machine learning, Spanish, public speaking

questions.question: Realistic hours per week you can spend learning?
questions.why_this_matters: Helps AI suggest appropriately-sized learning chunks.

options.label: 1-2 hours
options.export_rule: I have 1-2h/week for learning. Keep recommendations bite-sized.

options.label: 3-5 hours
options.export_rule: I have 3-5h/week for learning. Suggest structured weekly progress.

options.label: 5-10 hours
options.export_rule: I dedicate 5-10h/week to learning. Suggest intensive study plans.

options.label: 10+ hours
options.export_rule: I spend 10+ hours/week learning. Full curriculum-style plans welcome.

options.label: Unpredictable — varies wildly
options.export_rule: My learning time is unpredictable. Give me modular content I can pick up anytime.
